examples: Availability: Ageing skin with fine lines, droopy and dry skin.
Get into bed when you're sleepy — eyes droopy, you're drowsy, you feel like you're nodding off.

And perhaps above all the droopy mantra of 'it wizny me' is what they do not want.
Or perhaps your words will have the droopy intelligence of a Thurber dog.
